items.title: The Science Behind Why Soccer Players at the 2026 World Cup Are Cutting Their Socks
items.summary: Holes in socks have become a curious sight at this year’s World Cup. The reasons why are a weird mix of biomechanics, perception, and player habits.

items.title: Canadian spy agency says it hacked drug traffickers, extremists and a ransomware gang last year
